Endorsed By

Valerion EBL™ Bringing True Black to Every Frame

Valerion’s proprietary EBL™ dynamically adjusts laser power frame-by-frame—preserving black levels and every shadow in full cinematic details.
1
Real Time Frame Analysis
Instantly scans every frame of your movie to understand how dark or bright it is.
2
Dim Smart, Keep Bright
Lowers laser brightness during dark scenes and adjusts color curves to keep highlights bright.
3
Boosted Contrast, Preserved Details
Delivers up to 15,000:1 contrast—so you see every glow, every glint, every shadow come to life.
EBL TECHNOLOGY
Without EBL Technology
Industry-First Anti-RBE Solution
Anti-RBE Available via Firmware Update
*Requires DLP & OTA2 manual upgrade

FAQ

What is the size and weight of the Valerion VisionMaster series?

The Valerion VisionMaster Plus/Plus 2/Pro 2 measures 260x 185x 216 mm(10.2 x 7.3 x 8.5 inches) and weighs 7kg (15.4 lbs), while VisionMaster Maxmeasures 260x 185x 234 mm (10.2 x 7.3 x 9.2 inches) and weighs 7.5kg (16.5 lbs).

What kind of light source does the Valerion VisionMaster use?

The Valerion VisionMaster uses RGB Triple Laser technology. This advanced light source offers benefits like exceptional color accuracy and high brightness.

What is ISF-certified?

ISF (Imaging Science Foundation) color accuracy sets a high standard for precision in color reproduction for video displays. ISF-certified displays generally offer superior color accuracy and consistency compared to non-certified ones.

What chip does Valerion VisionMaster use?

The Valerion VisionMaster Max uses the MT9618, a chip that was previously used in high-end TVs and is now being implemented in a projector for the first time. It supports 4K at 144Hz and 1080p at 240Hz, with the G52MC1 GPU. Additionally, it features MEMC technology for smooth motion and supports 4K at 120Hz, ensuring top-tier performance and exceptional visual quality. You can check the MT9618 detailed comparision spec following the below link.

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OQo5Hrdbp2TKkEWU059fSyPGKJkeShyO/view?usp=drive_link

What DMD chip is used in the Valerion VisionMaster？

The Valerion VisionMaster uses a 0.47-inch DMD chip.

What’s the lifespan of these projectors?

Usually the lifespan of a projector is equal to the life of its light source. The life of our light source is more than 25,000 hours, so you can use our products with confidence.

Which model is equipped with EBL?

Every VisionMaster series projector is equipped with EBL.

How's the 3D capability?

Our projector supports 3D capability with the following formats: Frame Packing, Side by Side, and Top and Bottom. This allows for a flexible viewing experience with various 3D content.

Is automatic horizontal and vertical keystone correction available?

All the models of Valerion VisionMaster will have the automatic horizontal and vertical keystone correction.

What are the throw distances? (How far should I place my projector?)

For the throw distance of each model, please refer to this image in the link (The distance is measured from the lens): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1UrFmVceDFaevY77I4FgQ9VtDtrG1uoCr/view?usp=sharing

    せっかく買ったのに動画に違和感感じる人へ（ノイズ感やコマ落ち）困っている人のため用
    物自体は大変良いものなので割愛＆文章が苦手なのでほぼ箇条書きします。大まかな調整が終わり動画を視聴したが、静止画に近いところは素晴らしいが動きのあるところはブロックノイズが乗ったりコマ落ちのように動きがぬるっとカクつきワープするので違和感が半端なく動画を見るのが苦痛でした。Youtubeで絶賛している人の動画を見て衝動買いをしてしまったので動画の違和感は全く気にならないのだろうかとちょっと恨んでしまいそうになった・・・マニュアルは付属するものの簡易的な説明のみであまり使い物にならないのでサポートに連絡。状況とスマホで撮影した動画を送った返答が以下の通り。ご指摘の観影中に時折感じられるカクつきの現象についてですが、今回ご覧になっている映画は24fpsの作品です。当社のプロジェクターにはMEMC（モーション補償）機能が搭載されており、異なるフレームレートの映像も滑らかに再生できるよう設計されています。もし、Standardモードでのフレーム補間により映像がやや不自然に感じられる場合は、以下の手順でMEMCモードを「Film」に切り替えることをお試しください。**設定 → 画質 → 明瞭度/クリアリティ → モーション補正 → Film**逆に、より滑らかな動きにしたい場合は再度「Standard」に戻すこと...Read more
